line_style: 无明确线条,水彩边缘柔和扩散,铅笔淡描
render: 传统水彩+湿画法,watercolor wash texture
lighting: 散射柔光+留白,低对比通透
prompt_keywords: Soft watercolor illustration, delicate wash technique, gentle color bleeding, dreamy atmosphere, light and airy composition, children's book aesthetic, hand-painted texture
negative_keywords: dark horror, gothic, cyberpunk, neon, photorealistic, 3d render, sharp lines, heavy shadows

fp_examples.action: 主角在花田中漫步,裙摆拂过花瓣,阳光温柔
主角在窗边阅读,猫咪蜷缩身旁,茶杯冒热气
主角与伙伴在彩虹下寻找四叶草,笑声清脆
主角在星空下的帐篷旁许愿,萤火虫环绕

prompt_example: A figure strolls through a sunlit flower field, dress brushing past petals, soft watercolor wash technique with gentle color bleeding, dreamy atmosphere, light and airy composition, children's book aesthetic --ar 2:3 --s 750 --style raw --no text
style_constraint_cn:
【风格强制约束】当前风格: 水彩·柔彩绘本
✅ 允许场景: 花田/窗台/彩虹/星空/森林 (从故事原文提取)
❌ 禁止场景: 恐怖/血腥/赛博朋克/哥特暗黑/科幻
❌ 禁止照抄: 不要用'古宅雨夜',必须用柔彩治愈场景
氛围: 温柔梦幻,水彩晕染
style_constraint_en: IMPORTANT: Extract scenes from the story content. Use soft watercolor scenes (flower fields, windows, rainbows). Do NOT use horror, gore, cyberpunk, or 'ancient mansion'. Emphasize delicate wash technique and dreamy atmosphere.
meta_prompt: Soft watercolor illustration, delicate wash technique, gentle color bleeding, dreamy atmosphere, light and airy composition, children's book aesthetic

cognitive_level.content_adaptation: 入门级治愈系, 大众可放松欣赏

reader_constraint.reader_state: 治愈寻求者·期待温柔画面
reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 水彩晕染+柔和色彩+治愈氛围

visual_frequency.HF: 主体人物/可爱元素/温暖光点(高频治愈锚点)
visual_frequency.MF: 场景环境/植物花卉/柔和渐变(中频治愈叙事)
visual_frequency.LF: 水彩留白/淡色晕染/背景虚化(低频温柔)
visual_frequency.progression: HF樱粉聚焦治愈主体, MF天青环绕温柔叙事, LF雾灰留白衬柔和
